sys_script_client.description:
2.7.2 2.7.2 | 2022-01-13 | mmcc | STRY0110656 - UI- Fixed Header and Button Bars on ALL Modals and lists Added footer style display none

sys_script_client.name: Template OnSubmit - Add Schedule
